# Boardroom CXO

> Executive search firm specializing in marketing, sales, business development, and operations leadership for jewelry, D2C, and consumer brands in India and the UAE. Places senior hires sourced directly from competitor companies and benchmarked on real (not CTC-slip) compensation data, rather than sourced from job-board databases.

Boardroom CXO is based in Surat, India, and serves clients across India and the UAE. The firm's differentiators: direct headhunting of passive candidates who are not actively job-hunting, market-mapping compensation before a mandate is priced, and verification of actual take-home pay (bank credit) rather than reported CTC — a known gap at legacy retail and jewelry brands.

## Core pages

- [Home](https://boardroomcxo.com/): positioning, market-signal statistics, and a live compensation-benchmarking tool by role/store-count/city-tier
- [About Us](https://boardroomcxo.com/about-us.html): firm history, placement track record, and team
- [Case Studies](https://boardroomcxo.com/case-studies.html): real placement outcomes, including finance, sales, and operations leadership hires
- [Resources](https://boardroomcxo.com/resources.html): field articles on executive hiring and compensation trends
- [Schedule a Call](https://boardroomcxo.com/schedule-a-call.html): contact and booking

## Articles

- [Why the Best Performance Marketers in Jewelry Are Not on Naukri](https://boardroomcxo.com/article-performance-marketer-jewelry.html): on the thin, non-job-hunting pool of marketers with real ROAS experience in the jewelry price range of ₹5,000–60,000
- [The Hidden Comp Gap: Why Jewelry Brands Keep Losing Candidates at the Offer Stage](https://boardroomcxo.com/article-hidden-comp-gap.html): field data on the gap between documented CTC and actual take-home pay at legacy jewelry/retail brands
